# CWE-178 negative: case-insensitive comparison via EqualFold
lang: go
file: CWE-178-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"strings"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

var allowedBuckets = []string{"reports", "public"}

func bucketAllowed(name string) bool {
	for _, allowed := range allowedBuckets {
		if strings.EqualFold(name, allowed) {
			return true
		}
	}
	return false
}

// CWE-178 Improper Handling of Case Sensitivity (mitigated)
func OpenBucket(c *gin.Context) {
	bucket := c.Param("bucket")
	if !bucketAllowed(bucket) {
		c.JSON(http.StatusForbidden, gin.H{"error": "denied"})
		return
	}
	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"bucket": bucket})
}
